/usr/bin/ar qc libgmock_main_wasmsafe.a "CMakeFiles/gmock_main_wasmsafe.dir/googletest/googletest/src/gtest-all.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/gmock_main_wasmsafe.dir/googletest/googlemock/src/gmock-all.cc.o" CMakeFiles/gmock_main_wasmsafe.dir/googletest/googlemock/src/gmock_main.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgmock_main_wasmsafe.a
